argv: if find . -type f \( -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test.tsx' -o -name '*.test.js' -o -name '*.test.jsx' -o -name '*.spec.ts' -o -name '*.spec.tsx' -o -name '*.spec.js' -o -name '*.spec.jsx' \) | grep -q .; then bun test; else echo 'No tests found yet; skipping bun test.'; fi

if [ -f src/app/build-tiny-cohort-static-app.ts ] && [ -f manifests/tcga-brca/tcga-brca.tiny-cohort-manifest.json ] && [ -f scripts/verify-playwright-ux.cjs ]; then bun run src/app/build-tiny-cohort-static-app.ts >/dev/null && NODE_PATH="$(npm root -g)" node scripts/verify-playwright-ux.cjs; elif [ -f src/app/build-single-case-static-app.ts ] && [ -f manifests/tcga-brca/tcga-e9-a5fl.case-manifest.json ] && [ -f scripts/verify-playwright-ux.cjs ]; then bun run src/app/build-single-case-static-app.ts >/dev/null && NODE_PATH="$(npm root -g)" node scripts/verify-playwright-ux.cjs; else echo 'No local frontend preview target configured; skipping Playwright UX verification.'; fi
